version_description: 80’s funk rock feel. Please follow the record to understand the pace of these changes as there are many passing chords and nuances. Many of these sections feel the same, but are distinct in how the melody is delivered. Interlude plays as intro. Outro repeats to fade with ad-libs.

versions.version_description: A No.28 hit in early 1985 for the band from their 16th album "Emergency" - https://youtu.be/1O8jsxj9Dqo.

tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb
content:
*Tune your guitar a half step down to play along with the record as
heard here: https://youtu.be/x_GENnXPnoA?si=WzWgSw2914vHuDbd


Chord Voicings:

Em: 022000
E7sus4: 020200
Em7: 020000
D: XX0232
G6/D: XX0000
C: X32010
C6: X32210
D6: X5443X
Bm7: X24232
Cadd2: X30010
Dsus2: XX0230
Esus4: 022200
A: X02220
A7: X02020
A6: X02222
Asus2: X02200
Asus4: X02230
Bsus4: 799977
Bm: 799777



[Intro]
N.C.
[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4[/ch]
[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4[/ch]
[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4[/ch]
[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4[/ch]

[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4[/ch]
[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4[/ch]
[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4[/ch]
[ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G6/D[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]E7sus4[/ch]
 Late at night,       body's yearning[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]E7sus4[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G6/D[/ch]
 Restless night, want to be with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]E7sus4[/ch]
 Someone's playing,       in the garden[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G6/D[/ch]
 So enticing, he's sure to take a bite[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]       [ch]C6[/ch]               [ch]D6[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G6/D[/ch]
I don't know what's come over me, yeah[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]E7sus4[/ch]
 She's as heavy,       as a Chevy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G6/D[/ch]
 Pure excitement,          mis-led[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]E7sus4[/ch]
 When she touches,       can't resist her[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]E7sus4[/ch]     [ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G6/D[/ch]
 I'm a puppet when she's playing me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]         [ch]C6[/ch]          [ch]D6[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
She's out-going but I love her so, mis-led[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G6/D[/ch] [ch]Esus4[/ch]
So I'm  saying now[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Cadd2[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
 Baby  baby,    what's your claim to fame[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]E7sus4[/ch]    [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Cadd2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
 Got me out of bed,    heard you   call my name[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7sus4[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Cadd2[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
 What's this crazy place,    you want to take me to[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]E7sus4[/ch]          [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Cadd2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
 Tell me what's the price,    if I     go with you[/tab]


[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Cadd2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Cadd2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
 My heart,      my soul,     my love,          is   that the goal[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Cadd2[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Cadd2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
 The thrill,     then I will,   hey mis-led,        be for   real[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]E7sus4[/ch]
 Thought I knew her,       this lady[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G6/D[/ch]
 Opportunist,           mis-led[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]E7sus4[/ch]
 Always searching,       for adventure[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G6/D[/ch]
 Like Pandora's box,           mis-led, and[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]       [ch]C6[/ch]            [ch]D6[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
I don't know what I'm gonna do without her[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]
Whoo  hoo[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Cadd2[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
 Baby  baby,    what's your claim to fame[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]E7sus4[/ch]    [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Cadd2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
 Got me out of bed,    heard you   call my name[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7sus4[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Cadd2[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
 What's this crazy place,    you want to take me to[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]E7sus4[/ch]          [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Cadd2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
 Tell me what's the price,    if I     go with you[/tab]


[Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Cadd2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Cadd2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
 My heart,      my soul,     my love,          is   that the goal[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Cadd2[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Cadd2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
 The thrill,     then I will,   hey mis-led,        won't you   be for real[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]             [ch]A7[/ch]               [ch]A6[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Asus2[/ch]
I've got this feeling and it's rocking my brain[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]      [ch]Asus4[/ch]             [ch]Bsus4[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]
 But I love her just the same, just the same, oh yes I do[/tab]


[Interlude]
[ch]E7sus4[/ch]
[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4[/ch]
[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4[/ch]
[ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G6/D[/ch]


[Refrain]
[tab][ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Cadd2[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
 Mis - led,    heard you call my name[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Cadd2[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
 Mis-led,         what's your claim to fame[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]Cadd2[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
 Mis - led,    took me by the hand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Cadd2[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
 Mis-led,        said I would under-stand[/tab]

[tab][ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Cadd2[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
 Mis - led,    boule-vard of broken dreams[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Cadd2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
Mis-led,         never heard or seen[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Cadd2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
 Mis - led,    ba-by    that's your name[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Cadd2[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
Mis-led,         what's your claim to fame[/tab]


[Chorus 3]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Cadd2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Cadd2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
 My heart,      my soul,     my love,          is   that the goal[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Cadd2[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Cadd2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
 The thrill,     then I will,    mis-led,        won't you   be for real[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Cadd2[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Cadd2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
 Mis - led,    mis-led,      mis-led[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Cadd2[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Cadd2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
 Mis - led,    mis-led,      mis-led[/tab]
